# SLEEVES INDEX

This first public pass exposes a curated direct sleeve catalog and lightweight human-readable category surfaces.

Published now:
- direct sleeve catalog in `AI/MANIFESTS/sleeve-catalog.json`
- category placeholder/readme structure under `HUMAN/SLEEVES/categories/`
- lightweight per-category summaries where there is enough signal to name the area honestly

Not yet published:
- full private sleeve payloads
- runtime-private sleeve activation artifacts
- noisy or not-yet-curated sleeve-derived stores
